text:
Perfect! Your project has been successfully committed. The `git quickpush` command worked for adding and committing. 

To complete the setup for future pushes, you'll need to add a remote repository:

```bash
git remote add origin <your-github-repository-url>
```

Then you can use `git quickpush` again and it will push to your remote repository automatically.

Your EYE project is now initialized and committed locally! 🎉
